'''âm-s-l''' ('''masala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:limne|limne]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-s-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:limne|limne]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-s-l
|-
! Lemma
| masala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:masalithi|masalithi]] || [[word:masaliji|masaliji]] || [[word:masalishi|masalishi]] || [[word:masali|masali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:masaluthuth|masaluthuth]] || [[word:masalujuj|masalujuj]] || [[word:masalushush|masalushush]] || [[word:masal|masal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:masaluthu|masaluthu]] || [[word:masaluju|masaluju]] || [[word:masalushu|masalushu]] || [[word:masalu|masalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:masalufuth|masalufuth]] || [[word:masalufuj|masalufuj]] || [[word:masalufush|masalufush]] || [[word:masaluf|masaluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:masalethe|masalethe]] || [[word:masaleje|masaleje]] || [[word:masaleshe|masaleshe]] || [[word:masale|masale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:masalothoth|masalothoth]] || [[word:masalojoj|masalojoj]] || [[word:masaloshosh|masaloshosh]] || [[word:masal|masal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:masalotho|masalotho]] || [[word:masalojo|masalojo]] || [[word:masalosho|masalosho]] || [[word:masalo|masalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:masalofoth|masalofoth]] || [[word:masalofoj|masalofoj]] || [[word:masalofosh|masalofosh]] || [[word:masalof|masalof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:masalĂŠthĂŠ|masalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:masalĂŠjĂŠ|masalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:masalĂŠshĂŠ|masalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:masalĂŠ|masalĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:masalathath|masalathath]] || [[word:masalajaj|masalajaj]] || [[word:masalashash|masalashash]] || [[word:masal|masal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:masalatha|masalatha]] || [[word:masalaja|masalaja]] || [[word:masalasha|masalasha]] || [[word:masala|masala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:masalafath|masalafath]] || [[word:masalafaj|masalafaj]] || [[word:masalafash|masalafash]] || [[word:masalaf|masalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:masalasha|masalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomasalasha|gomasalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimasalasha|gokimasalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:masalnĂŒsha|masalnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomasalnknĂŒsha|gomasalnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimasalnĂŒsha|gokimasalnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:masalshĂ«sha|masalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomasalnkshĂ«sha|gomasalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimasalshĂ«sha|gokimasalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:masalrosha|masalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomasalnkrosha|gomasalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimasalrosha|gokimasalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:masalmusha|masalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomasalnkmusha|gomasalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimasalmusha|gokimasalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:masalsherasha|masalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomasalnksherasha|gomasalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimasalsherasha|gokimasalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:masalngasha|masalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomasalnkngasha|gomasalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimasalngasha|gokimasalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:masalyasha|masalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomasalnkyasha|gomasalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimasalyasha|gokimasalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:masalyamasha|masalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomasalnkyamasha|gomasalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimasalyamasha|gokimasalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:masalnĂŒshĂ«sha|masalnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomasalnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gomasalnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimasalnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokimasalnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:masalnĂŒrosha|masalnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomasalnknĂŒrosha|gomasalnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimasalnĂŒrosha|gokimasalnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:masalnĂŒmusha|masalnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomasalnknĂŒmusha|gomasalnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimasalnĂŒmusha|gokimasalnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:masalshĂ«nĂŒsha|masalshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomasalnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gomasalnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimasalshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokimasalshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:masalshĂ«rosha|masalshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomasalnkshĂ«rosha|gomasalnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimasalshĂ«rosha|gokimasalshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:masalshĂ«musha|masalshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomasalnkshĂ«musha|gomasalnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimasalshĂ«musha|gokimasalshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:masalronĂŒsha|masalronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomasalnkronĂŒsha|gomasalnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimasalronĂŒsha|gokimasalronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:masalroshĂ«sha|masalroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomasalnkroshĂ«sha|gomasalnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimasalroshĂ«sha|gokimasalroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:masalromusha|masalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomasalnkromusha|gomasalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimasalromusha|gokimasalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:masalmunĂŒsha|masalmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomasalnkmunĂŒsha|gomasalnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimasalmunĂŒsha|gokimasalmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:masalmushĂ«sha|masalmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomasalnkmushĂ«sha|gomasalnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimasalmushĂ«sha|gokimasalmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:masalmurosha|masalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomasalnkmurosha|gomasalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimasalmurosha|gokimasalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:masal|masal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:mĂŠsĂŠl|mĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homasal|homasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:homĂŠsĂŠl|homĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomasal|hohomasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomĂŠsĂŠl|hohomĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒmasal|nĂŒmasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒmĂŠsĂŠl|nĂŒmĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmasal|nĂŒnĂŒmasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠsĂŠl|nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻmasal|nĂŻmasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻmĂŠsĂŠl|nĂŻmĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmasal|nĂŻnĂŻmasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠsĂŠl|nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumasal|lumasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lumĂŠsĂŠl|lumĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumasal|lulumasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumĂŠsĂŠl|lulumĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limasal|limasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:limĂŠsĂŠl|limĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimasal|lilimasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimĂŠsĂŠl|lilimĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komasal|komasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:komĂŠsĂŠl|komĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomasal|kokomasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomĂŠsĂŠl|kokomĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemasal|kemasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kemĂŠsĂŠl|kemĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemasal|kekemasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemĂŠsĂŠl|kekemĂŠsĂŠl]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
